scripts.sync: bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/scripts/validate/validate-rules.bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/src/karabiner.edn && bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/scripts/validate/validate-extras.bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/src/karabiner.edn && bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/scripts/edit/normalize-edn.bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/src/karabiner.edn /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/src/karabiner.edn && bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/scripts/edit/reorder-by-state.bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/src/karabiner.edn /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/src/karabiner.edn && bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/scripts/generate/states.bb && cp /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/src/karabiner.edn ~/.config/ && goku && bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/scripts/edit/fix-device-conditions.bb && bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/scripts/edit/add-repeat.bb && bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/scripts/edit/relink-karabiner-json.bb && bb /Users/rbalicki/code/voicemode/scripts/test/run-tests.bb && osascript -e 'display notification "Done syncing" with title "Karabiner"'
scripts.kinesis: test -d /Volumes/ADV360/layouts && for i in 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9; do cp src/kinesis-layout1.txt /Volumes/ADV360/layouts/layout${i}.txt; done && echo 'Copied to all 9 layout slots' || echo 'Kinesis drive not mounted'
